PrivacyTerms

Disclaimer: The Synchron BCI System is an investigational device; its clinical benefit has not been validated, and it is not currently approved for commercial use in any geography. This content should be read in the context of this disclaimer.

CAUTION—Investigational device. Limited by Federal (or United States) law to investigational use.
